Name: Light Shaft
Description: Volumetric lighting effect that simulates visible beams of light scattering through participating media such as fog, dust, or haze, often enhanced by directional light occlusion and camera exposure response.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフトアルファ
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall opacity of light shafts, controlling the visibility and blending strength of volumetric light beams in the scene.

Fields.Name: Is Light Shaft Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables or disables volumetric light shaft rendering in the current scene or lighting context.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト抑制値
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Suppression Value: 1
Fields.Description: Primary suppression factor that reduces light shaft intensity, typically used to prevent overexposure or excessive bloom in volumetric lighting.

Fields.Name: Light Shaft Damping: 1
Fields.Description: Primary damping coefficient controlling how quickly light shafts attenuate with distance or scattering depth.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト抑制値2
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Suppression Value: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary suppression factor used for fine-tuning additional intensity reduction or layered volumetric control.

Fields.Name: Light Shaft Damping: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary damping parameter providing additional control over light shaft falloff behavior in complex lighting conditions.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト収束度
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Convergence Degree
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly light rays converge toward a focal direction, affecting beam tightness and directional focus.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト平行長さ
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Parallel Length
Fields.Description: Defines the distance over which light shafts maintain parallel alignment before diverging or fading.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト平行開始する角度
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Angle: Start to Run Parallel
Fields.Description: Angle threshold at which light shafts begin transitioning into a parallel beam configuration relative to the light direction.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフト平行完了する角度
Fields.Name: Light Shaft Angle: Parallel
Fields.Description: Angle at which light shafts are fully parallelized, producing maximum beam alignment and directional coherence.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフトフェードアウト開始する角度
Fields.Name: Right Light Shaft Angle: Fade Out Start
Fields.Description: Angle threshold where light shafts begin fading out due to directional misalignment or occlusion.

Fields.ID: ライトシャフトフェードアウト完了する角度
Fields.Name: Right Light Shaft Angle: Fade Out Complete
Fields.Description: Angle at which light shafts are fully faded out, resulting in complete disappearance of volumetric beam contribution.
